items.title: Putin Said the War ‘Is Coming to a Close,’ but That’s Not All He Said
items.summary: The Russian leader is walking a tightrope: acknowledging public discontent while offering no indication that he might give up on his demands.

items.title: South African president says he will not step down after impeachment call
items.summary: President Cyril Ramaphosa said he would not resign on Monday evening after days of speculation.
